scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @venturecrane/crane-mcp && npm run typecheck -w @venturecrane/crane-test-harness && npm run --prefix workers/crane-context typecheck && npm run --prefix workers/crane-watch typecheck && npm run --prefix workers/crane-mcp-remote typecheck
scripts.test: npm test -w @venturecrane/crane-mcp && npm test -w @venturecrane/crane-test-harness && npm run --prefix workers/crane-context test && npm run --prefix workers/crane-watch test && npm run --prefix workers/crane-mcp-remote test
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run test:canary && npm run build -w @venturecrane/crane-mcp && npm run build -w @venturecrane/crane-test-harness
scripts.postinstall: npm run build -w @venturecrane/crane-test-harness && npm install --prefix workers/crane-context && npm install --prefix workers/crane-watch && npm install --prefix workers/crane-mcp-remote
